title: Liberation of Bespin
content:
{{Top|ga|canon=Liberation of Cloud City}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Bespin}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Bespin_battle_BES.jpg]] |name=Liberation of Bespin |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]{{DB|character|willrowhood|Hood, Willrow}} |date=Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4]] and [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]According to ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', the liberation of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] occurred between the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], and [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City's]] acquisition by [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] approximately [[5 ABY/Legends|one year later]]. |place=[[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] |result=*Bespin liberated from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] freed from Imperial custody''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' *[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] reinstated as [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] of Cloud City |side1=Galactic Empire |side2=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[General/Legends|General]] Lando Calrissian |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2=*[[Lando's Commandos]] |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] *[[Vindicator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Vindicator''-class heavy cruisers]] *[[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|Sentinel-class landing craft]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] *6 [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] |forces2=*1 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] **[[X2]] *1 [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] *[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] *[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *Lando's Commandos *Lobot |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Many stormtroopers *Several TIE fighters *1 ''Vindicator''-class heavy cruiser *6 Dark troopers |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=1 [[Tibanna gas platform]] }} {{Quote|My brother was out there somewhere. But my first challenge as a Jedi would be the liberation of Bespin from the clutches of the Imperial Remnant. Fortunately, Lando Calrissian would be along for the ride.|X2|}} The '''liberation of Bespin''' occurred [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] victory at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] when the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] was seized from the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by Rebel [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Exploiting the Empire's state of disarray in the wake of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and information on Bespin's defenses leaked by Alliance sympathizers [[Willrow Hood/Legends|Willrow Hood]] and [[Tian Chyler]], the general, with the irregular unit known as "[[Lando's Commandos]]," launched a campaign dedicated to driving the Empire off of Bespin, culminating in the rescue of his former [[Aide/Legends|aide]] [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] by the [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[X2]]. While the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] inflicted heavy casualties among the remaining Imperial forces in the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and its [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] [[Gas/Legends|gas]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] settlement [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], Lobot took control of the [[City/Legends|city's]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems and reinstated Calrissian as its [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]], the position he had been forced to abandon to escape Bespin's Imperial [[Occupation of Bespin|occupation]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|We must plan for every contingency. We must defend Endor now, and we've promised General Calrissian assistance with liberating Cloud City.''"
"''I talked to Lando on the comlink. He says he's got ideas of his own.|Gial Ackbar and Han Solo|''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''}} Fleeing the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[occupation of Bespin]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] left his position as [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' an installation [[Mining/Legends|mining]] the [[Blaster gas/Legends|blaster gas]] and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Coolant/Legends|coolant]] [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] over the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]],''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'' to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and fight in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Rebellion and Empire. Working with his [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] former [[Aide/Legends|aide]] [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]], [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]], and Bespin's [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] population, Calrissian [[Ugnaught rebellion|overthrew]] Cloud City's Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]].[[Star Wars (1977) 57|''Star Wars'' (1977) 57]] [[File:C_C_celebration.png|thumb|left|300px|The citizens of Cloud City celebrated in the wake of the Battle of Endor.]] However, the Empire retook Bespin, maintaining control of Cloud City until after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], in which Calrissian, by then a [[General/Legends|general]], led the Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] assault, destroying the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] over the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].{{Film|VI}} After the battle, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] promised the general all the fighters the Alliance could spare, but with the Rebellion's resources occupied with the defense of the temporary Rebel [[Capital/Legends|capital]] at Endor and a [[Battle of Bakura|mission]] to the Imperial-held [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], Calrissian developed a plan of his own, assembling a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] dubbed "[[Lando's Commandos]]" for the task.{{CSWECite|II|243|Lando's Commandos}} Although he was briefly diverted to support his old friend and fellow Rebel [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in putting down an [[Black Sun civil war|attempted resurgence]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate, the former Baron Administrator made Cloud City's freedom the focus of his attention, taking advantage of the Empire's confusion following the Battle of Endor. On Cloud City, the population celebrated the Rebel victory at Endor with [[Fireworks/Legends|fireworks]] in a cheering demonstration. With the Alliance gaining the upper hand in the war, disenfranchised [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent [[Tian Chyler]] defected to the Rebellion, enlisting the aid of Alliance sympathizer [[Willrow Hood/Legends|Willrow Hood]] to turn over information on Cloud City's defenses, which proved vital in the liberation of Bespin.{{DB|character|chyler|Chyler, Tian}} ==The liberation== {{Quote|We need to free Lobot, X2. He's key to liberating Cloud City.|Lando Calrissian, to X2|}} In a [[Standard month/Legends|months]]-long campaign, Calrissian and his Commandos drove the remaining Imperial forces out of Cloud City. In a final strike, the Alliance sought to free Lobot, who was held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] on Cloud City by the Imperials, and employ his skill with [[Computer/Legends|computers]] to take control of the [[City/Legends|city]]. A Rebel force composed of an [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]], multiple [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]], and a group of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], including the general and the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[X2]], engaged in an [[Space warfare/Legends|aerial battle]] with the occupying forces—an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], several [[Vindicator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Vindicator''-class heavy cruisers]], and their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] complement. At Calrissian's direction, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] shot down a [[Tibanna gas platform]], causing it to plummet into and take out a ''Vindicator''-class [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]. After eliminating a number of pursuing [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]], X2 brought his starfighter down to a landing platform and joined General Calrissian on the colony's surface. [[File:Bespin_darktroopers_BES.jpg|thumb|right|300px|An Imperial landing craft deploying Dark troopers]] Making their way to a [[computer terminal]], the clone Jedi engaged [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] forces while the general determined the location of Lobot. Passing through a [[Carbon-freezing chamber/Legends|carbon-freezing chamber]] to reach the cyborg's [[Prison/Legends|cell]], the Jedi escorted Lobot to the central computer, defending him from attack as he bypassed [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shield]] defenses and gave Calrissian control of the city. A pair of [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] launched a counter-attack, deploying a stormtrooper detachment and six [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] to landing pads on opposite sides of the complex. Both forces were defeated by X2, Calrissian, and Lobot, freeing Cloud City from Imperial control. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Great job, X2! Bespin is liberated. The people of Cloud City extend their heartfelt thanks. Drinks are on me!|Lando Calrissian to X2|}} Following his victory, Calrissian was once again Baron Administrator of Cloud City, while Lobot's expertise led the cyborg to take on the role in a de facto capacity. In approximately [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], Calrissian's tenure would be cut short once again, losing Cloud City to [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]. ==Behind the scenes== The liberation of Bespin was first mentioned in the [[1993]] novel ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' by [[Kathy Tyers]], and it first appeared in the level "Bespin" of the [[2009]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''{{'s}} [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PlayStation Portable]] version. The conflict received a name in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Tian Chyler, written by [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] member "yoda's waiter" and published on [[StarWars.com]] in [[2007]].{{JCFCite|url=posts/27247743|board=Literature|thread=Official "What's the Story?" Hyperspace Databank Feature Discussion|user=[[Aidan Hennessy|QuentinGeorge]]|date=2007-03-08|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20221221230512/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/official-whats-the-story-hyperspace-databank-feature-discussion.20434695/page-87}} Although ''Elite Squadron'' identifies Cloud City's occupying force as the [[Imperial Remnant]], this faction was established in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the liberation's date, and thus this article treats the reference as an error. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the liberation of Bespin}} *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' *{{DB|character|chyler|Chyler, Tian}} {{1stID|liberation of Bespin}} *{{DB|character|willrowhood|Hood, Willrow}} *''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]'' *{{InsiderCite|152|Classic Moment|Classic Moment: Lando's Second Surprise}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 4 ABY 2}} {{Interlang |es=Liberación de Bespin }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bespin, Liberation of}} [[Category:Battles of Bespin]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
